message:
refactor(dashboard): extract parsing functions for testability

- Extract parseTapOutput() from collectTapInterfaces()
- Extract parseZfsOutput() from collectZFSDatasetsFromPath()
- Update DHCP test IPs to match new 10.0.100.x subnet

Separating the parsing logic from command execution makes these
functions easier to unit test without requiring actual system commands.
